zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight於1350年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy and Innermeath47歲，母親Margaret de Holkettle - Heiress of Holkettle46歲。他於大約1375年與Isabel Ergadia MacDougall在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年4月26日在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾盧巴 加布。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight于1350年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy and Innermeath47岁，母亲Margaret de Holkettle - Heiress of Holkettle46岁。他于大约1375年与Isabel Ergadia MacDougall在英国苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年4月26日在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾盧巴 加布。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight was born in 1350, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy and Innermeath, was 47 and his mother, Margaret de Holkettle - Heiress of Holkettle, was 46. He married Isabel Ergadia MacDougall about 1375, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 26 April 1421, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Rubha Garbh, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Grandtully, Perth and Kinross, Scotland,: Grandtully, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight est né en 1350, à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy and Innermeath, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Holkettle - Heiress of Holkettle, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Ergadia MacDougall environ 1375, à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Rubha Garbh, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knightが1350年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy and Innermeathは47歳，母Margaret de Holkettle - Heiress of Holkettleは46歳であった。約1375年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルでIsabel Ergadia MacDougallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年4月26日に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルルブハ ガーブにて埋葬された。

ko.Grandtully, Perth and Kinross, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 그랜투리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight(이)가 1350년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy and Innermeath(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Holkettle - Heiress of Holkettle(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 Isabel Ergadia MacDougall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 4월 26일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 루브하 가브h에 묻혔다.

ru.Grandtully, Perth and Kinross, Scotland,: грандтулли, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight родился в 1350 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy and Innermeath было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Holkettle - Heiress of Holkettle, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Ergadia MacDougall около 1375 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 26 апреля 1421 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности рубха гарбх, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.Dunstaffnage Argyllshire Scotland: Rubha Garbh, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight nació en 1350, en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Stewart of Shambothy and Innermeath, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Margaret de Holkettle - Heiress of Holkettle, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Isabel Ergadia MacDougall aproximadamente 1375, en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de abril de 1421, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Rubha Garbh, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido.
